supported_scope: syntax / grammar / semantic status emitted by the live engine
unsupported_scope: whole-crate no_std or hardware qualification claims
precision_note: Equivalence is assessed conservatively at the live-status level: syntax label, grammar state/reason, semantic disposition, selected heuristic IDs, and trust-scalar drift within a small numeric tolerance. The current evidence is intentionally scoped to the bounded live path.

scenario_summaries.note: Generated from the bounded live path using the scenario residual sequence replayed sample-by-sample under the current numeric backend.
